ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS:DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: THE REQUEST TO CORRECT JUDGMENT MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN 30 DAYS AFTER THE CLERK MAILED THE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WHICH WAS IN 2014. THIS REQUEST IS 10 YEARS LATE. CCP 116.725(A)(2).
